name: preset-agent-skills
description: Preset agent skill packages split by surface: direct API workflows and MCP-only tool workflows.

plugins.name: preset-api-skills
plugins.description: Preset API skills for explicit direct API workflows only. Do not use for MCP-only work; install preset-mcp-skills for MCP tool workflows.

plugins.name: preset-mcp-skills
plugins.description: Preset/Superset MCP skills for deterministic MCP tool discovery, safe MCP workflows, and MCP-only surface routing. Ask before switching to direct API.
